name: IC2 Experimental
description: IndustrialCraft 2 Experimental reactor simulation. Source: MauveCloud Ic2ExpReactorPlanner.

eu.label: EU Mode
eu.description: Standard EU generation. Fuel rods produce EU directly and generate heat distributed to neighbors.

fluid.label: Fluid Mode
fluid.description: Fluid reactor mode. Fuel rods vent heat to external fluid system instead of producing EU. MOX scaling active.
fluid.moxNotes: In fluid mode, MOX heat output doubles when hull heat > 50% of maxHeat.

mechanics.fuelHeatFormula: heatMult * pulses * (pulses + 1) where pulses = neutronNeighbors + basePulses (1/2/3 for single/dual/quad)
mechanics.fuelEnergyFormula: energyMult * pulses, then MOX: floor(eu * (1 + 4.0 * hullHeat / maxHeat))
mechanics.moxHeatDoubling: When fluidMode AND hullHeat > 50% maxHeat, heat output doubles
mechanics.reflectorDamage: Reflector takes damage = rodCount of each adjacent fuel rod per tick
mechanics.ventDissipateOrder: 1. Hull draw, 2. Self vent, 3. Side vent (if applicable)
mechanics.exchangerTransferOrder: 1. Side transfer to neighbors, 2. Hull transfer
mechanics.condensatorBehavior: Only accepts positive heat. Needs coolant injection at >85% capacity. Cannot be cooled passively.
